1.q: The interaction between AcHog1 and AcSko1 was verified by yeast two‐hybrid assays... thus indicating that AcHog1 could interact with AcSko1.

2.q: the interaction between Acpbs2 and its downstream gene Achog1 was verified by yeast two‐hybrid assays.

3.q: Achog1, which is homologous to hog1 from Saccharomyces cerevisiae... the HOG-MAPK pathway is the main way to adapt to changes in osmolarity... Achog1 plays a positive role in asexual development.
Hog1 (MAPK), the core protein kinase of the HOG pathway, is a highly conserved protein that is expressed in most eukaryotes.
Among these protein kinases, the core protein kinase is Hog1 (MAPK)... Hog1 is activated by phosphorylated Pbs2 to maintain the stability of the intracellular environment.
